'''zazasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jigawatt|jigawatt]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-z-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jigawatt|jigawatt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zazasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæzæshæth|zæzæshæth]] || [[word:zæzæshæj|zæzæshæj]] || [[word:zæzæshæsh|zæzæshæsh]] || [[word:zæzæshæ|zæzæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zazazashath|zazazashath]] || [[word:zazazashaj|zazazashaj]] || [[word:zazazashash|zazazashash]] || [[word:zazazasha|zazazasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zazashath|zazashath]] || [[word:zazashaj|zazashaj]] || [[word:zazashash|zazashash]] || [[word:zazasha|zazasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zazafshath|zazafshath]] || [[word:zazafshaj|zazafshaj]] || [[word:zazafshash|zazafshash]] || [[word:zazafshaf|zazafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zazashatha|zazashatha]] || [[word:zazashaja|zazashaja]] || [[word:zazashasha|zazashasha]] || [[word:zazashaka|zazashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zazashath|zazashath]] || [[word:zazashaj|zazashaj]] || [[word:zazashash|zazashash]] || [[word:zazasha|zazasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zazashathal|zazashathal]] || [[word:zazashajal|zazashajal]] || [[word:zazashashal|zazashashal]] || [[word:zazashakal|zazashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zazashathatha|zazashathatha]] || [[word:zazashajaja|zazashajaja]] || [[word:zazashashasha|zazashashasha]] || [[word:zazashaka|zazashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zazashathan|zazashathan]] || [[word:zazashajan|zazashajan]] || [[word:zazashashan|zazashashan]] || [[word:zazashakan|zazashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zazashathaoro|zazashathaoro]] || [[word:zazashajaoro|zazashajaoro]] || [[word:zazashashaoro|zazashashaoro]] || [[word:zazashakaoro|zazashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
